federation.note: The chat/conversation interop RECONCILER between the suite's three chat shapes — ActivityStreams 2.0 (the canonical write model, exactly what @jeswr/pod-chat produces: as:Note/as:Collection/as:attributedTo/as:published/as:inReplyTo/as:mediaType, the wf:Task actionable overlay carried through), SolidOS meeting:LongChat (the installed-base read: sioc:content/foaf:maker/dct:created, dct:isReplacedBy edit, schema:dateDeleted delete), and an external-schema adapter seam with one concrete LibreChat adapter (text/createdAt/sender/conversationId/parentMessageId/model → AS2.0, AI messages → prov: attribution, no LibreChat-private field leaks). Mints NO new chat predicate; reuses pod-chat's pc:ChatRoom and the @jeswr/solid-task-model wf:Task overlay so an actionable message is the SAME shape solid-issues/PM read. Pure-RDF, non-server-touching; untrusted IRIs filtered http(s)-only on read AND write. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration.
